description: CompositionRed half-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has red and blue checks with white accents, two chest pockets, a full length buttoned placket, brand name printed below the nape of the neck and a curved hemWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsChecks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks. Size and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
